free_text: Differential cross-section of elastic and inelastic
neutron scattering on  Be, Al, V, Zr, Mo and Bi
Hollow cylinders with outer diameter 45 mm, inner
Total energy resolution of spectrometer 290 keV.
Data are compared with optical model calculation.
Correction is made on flux absorption and multiple
Quoted error consist of statistical error,
error of energy scale of spectrometer, monitor error.
